blocks.md: A game has state, selection, and repetition. State is the word or board. Selection decides what is visible or who has won. Repetition asks for the next move until the state is final.
**Hangman reveal.** Start with a row of `_`. Use `‚ąä` to mark which letters have been guessed. Compress the positions and letters by that mask, then assign the guessed letters into the blank board.

blocks.prompt: Define `reveal`, which shows guessed letters and `_` for the rest. It will be tested as `'apple' reveal 'pe'` and should give `_pp_e`.
blocks.hint: make blanks, compute ‚ćļ‚ąä‚ćĶ, then assign m/‚ćļ into positions m/‚ć≥‚ČĘ‚ćļ

blocks.prompt: Define `wrong`, which counts how many guessed letters `‚ćĶ` are not in word `‚ćļ`. It will be tested as `'apple' wrong 'xpz'` and should give 2.
blocks.hint: ‚ćĶ‚ąä‚ćļ marks hits; ~ turns hits into misses; +/ counts them

blocks.md: **Hangman play.** The board below uses the same `reveal` definition. Each guess changes the guessed-letter set, then `reveal` draws the visible word.

blocks.label: Hangman: guess the hidden word, six lives.

blocks.md: **Tic-tac-toe board.** The board is a 3 by 3 character matrix of `.`. A move is indexed assignment into one cell.
**Tic-tac-toe win check.** Number the cells 1 through 9. There are eight winning lines: three rows, three columns, two diagonals. Store them as an 8 by 3 matrix of positions named `L`.
Now make a mask with `‚ćĶ='X'`. Index that mask by `L` to gather the three cells of each line. `‚ąß/` tests each line. `‚ą®/` tests whether any line won.

blocks.prompt: Build a tic-tac-toe board: a 3 by 3 matrix of `.`. Place `X` at the top left and `O` in the centre, then show the board.
blocks.hint: reshape '.' into shape 3 3, then assign cells with b[row;column]‚Üź

blocks.prompt: Define `wins`, which reports whether `X` has a complete line on a 9-character board. It will be tested on `'XXX...OO.'` and should give 1.
blocks.hint: index the X-mask by the 8 by 3 line matrix, reduce each line with ‚ąß/, then reduce the line results with ‚ą®/
